title: git kura worktree metadata
description: Schema for <git-common-dir>/kura/meta/worktrees/<key>.json, the metadata recorded for a managed worktree.

repositoryRoot.description: Absolute path of the repository the worktree was created from.

baseBranch.description: Branch the worktree was based on at creation time.

worktreePath.description: Absolute path of the managed worktree.
